title: Complex Scenario Verification Pipeline
summary: Execute natural-language scenario, capture node evidence, verify semantic tokens by app location, and report result bundle to Telegram.
n8n_prompt: Create a workflow that starts when a scenario request arrives, runs the local scenario executor, attaches node screenshots and logs, verifies required semantic tokens by location, and sends a Telegram report with pass/fail evidence and next actions.
evidence: Goal completed by planner should not be treated as final success without semantic verification
Node-level screenshots are required for trustable output verification
